steps.title: Match the opening phrase
steps.content: The sentence begins with an appositive: a government body officially known as the Althing. The subject after the comma must name that same government body.

steps.title: Rule out dangling subjects
steps.content: Choice A makes the subject the world's oldest parliaments. Choice C makes it the first meeting. Choice D makes it 930 CE. None of those can be the government body known as the Althing.

steps.title: Choose the matching noun
steps.content: Iceland's parliament is the noun that correctly matches the opening appositive and can logically be known as the Althing. The answer is B.
